qmd_context: SlabMetrics Obsidian vault — sports card domain knowledge wiki and engineering project docs. Cards wiki covers grading services (PSA, BGS, SGC, CGC), grading scales and standards, population reports, card parallels, no-grade outcomes. Engineering wiki covers system architecture (Next.js, Supabase, Clerk, Stripe), pricing pipeline design, data model, vendor decisions. Company docs cover founder agreement, business plan, product strategy, subscription model.
